subject: Considering Not Renewing
body: Usage is very low and team feedback is negative. We are considering other options.

subject: 5th Complaint Already
body: This is my 5th complaint about the same issue. If it is not resolved we will switch vendors.

subject: Renewal and Upsell
body: We are very satisfied and would like to renew and purchase 3 additional modules.

subject: Refund Request
body: There was a 3-day service outage this month. We request an SLA-based refund. Otherwise we will consider terminating the contract.

subject: Parking Fee Adjustment
body: Parking fees will be adjusted next month.
